tokens.text: validates texture_list.json against the pack's texture images

title: Texture List
description: Validates the optional texture_list.json file in a resource pack. When present, it must reference every non-Vibrant Visuals texture image in the pack, and it must not reference images that belong to a texture_set.json (the PBR companion images). When texture_list.json is absent, this validation is skipped.

fields.title: Texture Not Listed
fields.description: Error when a non-Vibrant Visuals texture image in the pack is not referenced in texture_list.json. Every regular pack texture must be listed.
fields.technicalDescription: Data contains the normalized pack-relative path of the texture image that is missing from texture_list.json.

fields.title: Texture Set Image Listed
fields.description: Error when an image that belongs to a texture_set.json (such as a _mer/_mers/heightmap/normal companion) is referenced in texture_list.json. Texture set images must not be listed.
fields.technicalDescription: Data contains the normalized texture_list.json entry that incorrectly references a texture set image.
